title: Sophisticated Savory Portuguese Chicken Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Portuguese dish featuring chicken, dried cherries, and a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a special occasion. This halal-friendly recipe is sure to impress your guests.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the dried cherries, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer the tagine for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
